languages.text: "Шестеренки... не доверяйте им, Ваша Светлость. Их дары легко превращаются в цепи зависимости. А их цели нередко отличаются от ваших — и в итоге простой человек сам оказывается их добычей. Но если уж отказать им не вариант — не дайте зарковцам оказаться зависимыми от таинств техножрецов".

"Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."
languages.original_text: "Шестеренки... не доверяйте им, Ваша Светлость. Их дары легко превращаются в цепи зависимости. А их цели нередко отличаются от ваших — и в итоге простой человек сам оказывается их добычей. Но если уж отказать им не вариант — не дайте зарковцам оказаться зависимыми от таинств техножрецов".

But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

languages.text: 「歯車…信用するな、御{mf|殿|女殿}。彼らの贈り物はお易しくも束縛の鎖に変わる。彼らの目的はしばしばあなたとは大きく異なり、結局は一般市民が彼らの獲物となる。もし拒否ができないのなら、ザルコビアンがテクノロジー司祭の謎に依存することを許すな」
languages.original_text: "Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

traits.locale_text: 「歯車…信用するな、御{mf|殿|女殿}。彼らの贈り物はお易しくも束縛の鎖に変わる。彼らの目的はしばしばあなたとは大きく異なり、結局は一般市民が彼らの獲物となる。もし拒否ができないのなら、ザルコビアンがテクノロジー司祭の謎に依存することを許すな。」

languages.text: «No me fío de los atornillados, mi{mf|lord|lady}... Sus regalos pueden convertirse fácilmente en grilletes de control. Además, sus objetivos suelen ser muy distintos a los nuestros y, al final, la gente humilde es la que acaba pagando por ellos. Pero si no podemos rechazar su presencia, al menos no permita que los zarkovianos dependan de los misterios de los tecnosacerdotes».
languages.original_text: "Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

traits.locale_text: «No me fío de los atornillados, mi{mf|lord|lady}... Sus regalos pueden convertirse fácilmente en grilletes de control. Además, sus objetivos suelen ser muy distintos a los nuestros y, al final, la gente humilde es la que acaba pagando por ellos. Pero si no podemos rechazar su presencia, al menos no permita que los zarkovianos dependan de los misterios de los tecnosacerdotes».

languages.text: “齿轮脑袋……可别信他们，大人。他们的礼物眨眼就能变成捆人的锁链，而他们的目标往往与您截然不同——最后遭殃的总是老百姓。如果非用他们不可，那至少别让扎尔科夫人依赖上技术神甫的玄乎玩意儿。”
languages.original_text: "Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

traits.locale_text: “齿轮脑袋……可别信他们，大人。他们的礼物眨眼就能变成捆人的锁链，而他们的目标往往与您截然不同——最后遭殃的总是老百姓。如果非用他们不可，那至少别让扎尔科夫人依赖上技术神甫的玄乎玩意儿。”

languages.text: "Cogs ... Vertraut nicht auf sie, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ihr Gaben können sich allzu leicht in Ketten verwandeln. Und ihre Ziele unterscheiden sich oft stark von den Euren ... und am Ende sind es die einfachen Leute, die ihnen zum Opfer fallen. Aber wenn ihre Zurückweisung keine Option ist, lasst nicht zu, dass die Zarkovianer von den Geheimnissen der Techpriester abhängig werden."
languages.original_text: "Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

Und ihre Ziele unterscheiden sich oft stark von den Euren ... und am Ende sind es die einfachen Leute, die ihnen zum Opfer fallen. Aber wenn ihre Zurückweisung keine Option ist, lasst nicht zu, dass die Zarkovianer von den Geheimnissen der Techpriester abhängig werden."

languages.text: "Dişliler... Onlara güvenmeyin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Armağanları kolayca esaret zincirlerine dönüşebilir. Ayrıca hedefleri genellikle sizinkilerden çok farklıdır. Sonunda avları hâline gelenler, sıradan halk olur. Onları reddetmek bir seçenek değilse o zaman Zarkovluların Tekno Rahiplerin gizemlerine bağımlı hâle gelmesine izin vermeyin."
languages.original_text: "Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."

traits.locale_text: "Dişliler... Onlara güvenmeyin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Armağanları kolayca esaret zincirlerine dönüşebilir. Ayrıca hedefleri genellikle sizinkilerden çok farklıdır. Sonunda avları hâline gelenler, sıradan halk olur. Onları reddetmek bir seçenek değilse o zaman Zarkovluların Tekno Rahiplerin gizemlerine bağımlı hâle gelmesine izin vermeyin."

languages.text: « Par les rouages... Méfiez-vous d'eux, Votre Seigneurie. Leurs dons peuvent aisément se transformer en liens d'asservissement et leurs objectifs sont souvent très différents des vôtres. Au bout du compte, ce sont les gens du commun qui en pâtiront. Si vous ne pouvez pas vous permettre de refuser, ne laissez pas les Zarkoviens devenir dépendants des mystères des technoprêtres. »
languages.original_text: "Cogs... Don't trust them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Their gifts can easily turn into chains of bondage. And their goals are often very different from yours — and in the end it's the common folk who wind up as their prey. But if refusing them is not an option, then don't let the Zarkovians become dependent on the Tech-Priests' mysteries."
